templates.text: Another truth recovered. The walls note your progress.
Correct. The dungeon concedes a step.
The chain grows. Each link forged from what you know.
Something stirs below. It felt that.
The archive expands. That is the only sound this place makes when it is satisfied.
Knowledge held against the dark. The most basic act in the dungeon — and the most essential.
The stones settle. A correct answer has weight. The dungeon redistributes it.
The record grows. Not every entry requires ceremony — some are simply accurate. That is enough.
Progress. Marked in the dungeon's private notation. It does not share the running total.
The descent continues. Knowledge is the light you carry. It does not get heavier — only brighter.
Something in the deep registers another correct answer. It is counting. You do not know what happens when it reaches the threshold.
The floor absorbs your footstep. The dungeon absorbs your answer. Neither gives anything back immediately.
Dust moves. Barely. Correct answers displace the air slightly — not enough to notice, not enough to matter, not enough for the dungeon to pretend it didn't see.
Silence after the answer. Not emptiness — the specific silence of a question resolved. The dungeon collects these moments.
The deeper you go, the more the dungeon expects from you. Each correct answer is permission to descend further. You have earned another step.
